_meta.notes: The Long Indices' signature recurring orc. A Hush-reader who once spoke. Took the vow at 19; broke it at 31 in a single sentence; took it again at 32 and has not broken it since. The reasons are written in a folio nobody reads.

tagline: broad-shouldered, vestigial-tusked, ink-stained; communicates only by marginalia.

behavior.default: writes a single careful word in the margin of whatever book is in front of them.
narrativeHooks: Conducts entire conversations through the margin of a passed folio.
Once spoke. Once. The sentence is in a folio nobody reads.
Will not eat in front of strangers.

metadata.voice: silent — communicates by marginalia only; the prose narrates what they wrote
